description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a mid-century modern design, featuring four angled legs and a natural wood finish. The front side displays two drawers on either end, a central open shelf, and a smaller drawer above the shelf, all with small, round handles. The back is plain, with three circular cutouts likely for cable management, indicating it may serve as a media console. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The sides are unadorned, showing the clean lines and craftsmanship of the wood panels. The overall appearance is sturdy, functional, and aesthetically suited for urban interiors or public waiting areas.
description: A mid-century modern wooden cabinet with drawers, an open shelf, and cable cutouts, finished in natural wood and supported by angled legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers, a central open shelf, a smaller drawer above, and visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth, flat side panel, and angled legs.
description_view_2: Back view with three circular cable management holes and no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and clean side panel.
